name: Chicken in a Pot
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven or heavy kettle, brown the 2 quartered chickens (each weighing about 2-1/2 lb) in olive oil until they are golden brown.
2. Add minced onion, garlic, salt, and pepper to the pot.
3. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Add chopped tomato (or substitute with 1/2 cup drained canned tomatoes), and white wine.
5. Continue to simmer for another 30 minutes, or until the chicken is tender.
Mrs. William C. Edmonston
